service.name: ExchangeRate-API
service.description_for_ai: Real-time and historical currency exchange rates for 160+ currencies. Free tier: 1500 requests/month, no credit card. Use for currency conversion, showing prices in local currency, financial calculations.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://www.exchangerate-api.com — free tier, no credit card

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get current exchange rates for a base currency against all other currencies. Use for 'what is USD to RUB rate', 'convert euros to dollars', 'currency exchange rates today'.

base_currency.description: Base currency code: USD, EUR, RUB, GBP, JPY, CNY, KZT, BYN etc.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Convert a specific amount from one currency to another. Use for 'how much is 100 dollars in rubles', 'convert 500 EUR to GBP'.
intent: how much is X in Y

agent_hints.common_codes: USD=US Dollar, EUR=Euro, RUB=Russian Ruble, GBP=British Pound, JPY=Japanese Yen, CNY=Chinese Yuan, KZT=Kazakhstani Tenge, BYN=Belarusian Ruble, UAH=Ukrainian Hryvnia
agent_hints.update_frequency: Rates updated every 24 hours on free tier, every hour on Pro.
agent_hints.calculation_tip: To convert: result = amount * conversion_rate. E.g. 100 USD * 89.5 = 8950 RUB
